# Find Skills

Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabili…

## Install

```sh
npx github:Elvis020/hey-skills add find-skills --to ./skills
```
